titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 63: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 63. (A.R. No. 13 of 1895.) KAṆḌIYŪR, TANJAVUR TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall, central shrine, Vīraṭṭānēśvara temple.

Damaged and incomplete. Records that an individual, named Māyāṉ (Māyōn ?) Kāñchaṉ alias Villavaṉ Mūvēndavēḷār, a resident of Puduvūr in Tirunaṟaiyūr-nāḍu made some gift (the details of which are lost in the damaged portion of the inscription) to burn a perpetual lamp to the god Tiruvīraṭṭāṉattu-Mahādēva at Tirukkaṇḍiyūr and also to provide grand food-offerings every month to the same deity on the occasion of his birth astericism Sōdi (Svāti).
Published in S.I.I., Vol. III No. 134.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śrī Uttamacoḻa[ devarāṉa]The syllables śrī uttamacoḻa devarāṉa are written over an erasure.kopparakesarivarmmarkku yāṇ(ṭ)ṭu 9 Āvatu tirukkaṇṭiyūrt tiruviraṭṭānattu mahād[eva]rkku tirunaṟaiyūr ṇaṭṭuRead nāṭṭuputuvūr putuvū(r)ruṭaiyāṉ māyāṉ kāñca(ṉ)ṉāṉa villavaṉ muventave(ḷ)ḷāneṉ tiruviraṭṭāṉattu mahādevarkku Oru tirunaṉtā viḷakku
neyyāl Erippataṟkum Imahādevarkku tiṅkaḷ(ḷ)toṟum Eṉ(p) piṟatta nā(ḷ)ḷākaRead eṉ piṟantanāḷāṉacoti nāṉṟu perutiruvamutu c[ Eyya candrā] dityaval vaiytta patteṭṭukkuttalarici mukkuruṇikku nellu Eḻukuruṇi ṉāṉāḻiyum naṟuney Urikku nellu patakkum tayir Amutu nānāḻikku nel
lu �ḻi muḻākkum tūp paruppu Iruṉāḻikku nellu kuṟuṇi muṉṉāḻiyum caṟkarai nāṟppalattukkum vā(ḻ)ḻaippaḻam kku nellu kuṟuṇi ruḻākkakku nellu nānāḻiyum Aṭaiyamutu paṉṉiraṇ(ṭ)ṭukku nellu muṉṉāḻiyum viṟakurkuRead viṟakukkunellu kuṟuṇiyu
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 63 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
